title: The Disappearing Cat
content: Mrs. Green's orange cat disappeared every afternoon at exactly the same time. No one knew where it went. Curious neighbors quietly followed the cat one day. It walked through several gardens before stopping at a small bakery. The owner greeted the cat with a smile and gave it a little bowl of water every afternoon. After resting in the shade for a while, the cat calmly returned home before dinner. The mystery had been solved, and everyone found the story charming.
